economic_notes: Band has multiple related entities including Kinbasket Development Corporation, Kinbasket Water & Sewer Company Ltd., Kinbasket Property Development Corporation, Kenpesq't Holdings Ltd., and various Kenpesq't limited partnerships. Kenpesq't Limited Partnership (100% owned) accounted for by modified equity method with net income of $76,084 for year ended December 31, 2023. Loan receivable of $1,000,000 to SEM Holdings Ltd. Investment in Nation business entities includes SEM Holdings, St. Eugene Mission Holdings, North Rock Holdings, and BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on three bases: (1) financial information for certain investment in nation business entities not available at audit date; (2) advances to related nation entities includes $600,000 from Columbia River Properties that may not be collectable; (3) tangible capital assets include sub-leased land rights carried at fair value (not PSAS compliant) and deferred revenue includes appraisal increase of $2,386,467 for sub-leased land rights (also not PSAS compliant). Prior period adjustment restated 2023 figures reducing accumulated surplus by $74,794. Auditor firm identified as Ribeyre CPA based in Port Coquitlam BC. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $1,804,929 + CMHC $52,420 + FNHA $566,201 + BC Gaming $395,821 + Province of BC $5,568,559 + property taxes $645,871 (quasi-government) = $9,033,801 excluding property taxes, or $10,187,930 including property taxes. expenses_enterprises includes Kenpesq't Holdings $24,553 + Kinbasket Development Corporation $290,693 + Kinbasket Water and Sewer $788,183 + Kinbasket Property Development $1,055 = $1,104,484.
